then in the official version in 1995 And this programming language was made by James Gosling and its team And this project was made by this team, which we know as Green team Sun Microsystem was a company in California, in the United States In this company, a team was formed, which was called Green team and the lead of that team was James Gosling All these teams carried out the project of this programming language and officially released it When this programming language was released, they took major steps which changed the entire destiny of Java The first major step was to download it freely They announced that Java is a free language and it doesn't have to pay anything to develop the application This course is totally free of cost They also announced that it is an object oriented the programming language They didn't restrict it in their company They announced that they are ready for programming language If someone thinks that this feature should be added and it can be made better They can contribute to this project Because of which, Java grew in rich in features Many features were added in Java and from there, Java started using it for application development Apart from straightforward because it is an object oriented programming language The programming language that is object oriented is very simple Of course, some of our viewers would have exposed Java before this Usually, Java is compared with any other programming language by writing the first hello world program They say that a code is required for Java and it works only with one or two lines We don't compare with a code of one or two lines If you have used programming language in all these processes, then you can decide whether it is easy or difficult The proof of this is that Java has been used for more than two decades in industry Even today, this is a high demand programming language It is very simple and if it wasn't simple, it would have been used for a while So, what is object oriented? What is its syntax? What is its style? We will try to know it today Along with it, there are important features like portable, platform-independent, and VORA These are also important features of Java which we will try to know briefly Many other features are called as robust programming languages Distributed, multi-threaded, which gradually, as we will progress in the course As you will understand about conceptual Java, you will automatically understand all these things Of course, in today's time, we will talk about some basic fundamentals of object orientation What is portable, VORA, or platform-independence? We will try to know about it briefly So, this is the basics of Java or introduction to Java We will know about it in the next video Thank you Thank you
